attributes.action: Remove Business rates for Pubs and Restaurants
attributes.additional_details: It needs saving and by introducing business rates will put pubs out of business and staff will lose jobs.
attributes.background: Do not reintroduce business rates on an industry that is already struggling. Over 10 pubs a week are closing in the UK as they struggle to make ends meet due to increasing taxes and extortionate utility bills.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Abolish business rates for UK pubs and hospitality businesses
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754654
